title: Drivable End Ships
description: Allow you to drive the End ship
body:
Now end portal frame will spawn in the end ship and you can put Eye of ender in it Then throw a Ship wheel on it

___________________
 ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/246a9c9dc018bf68399f87be22ca9b28c55c6223.png)
 
 The recipe for the Ship wheel 

______________________________________



 Right click on the Ship wheel to move one block

 
 
 
   
 Left click to move until left click again
